text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for Mejiro Dober's senior-year
summer camp! She'll need to pack on a lot more
power for the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's make this a good summer camp, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll make the most of this blistering summer and
prepare for the fall racing season!
